title: trema parviflorum
intro: Trema parviflorum, also known as the Small-Flowered Trema or Small-Leaf Trema, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cannabaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Trema parviflorum include treating fever, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as providing relief from pain and swelling. Herbal preparations of Trema parviflorum can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using them as a poultice to apply topically.
